caption: A man wearing a dark green t-shirt and a matching green baseball cap sits in a room filled with framed photographs and clothing racks. He wears large black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. His t-shirt features the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT". In the background, a white mannequin wears a white shirt, and various items of clothing hang on racks. Two logos appear on the screen: a circular black and white logo on the left and a red text logo on the right that reads "NOBODY REALLY KNOWS". As the scene progresses, the man gestures emphatically with both hands, moving them upward and outward to emphasize his points. His facial expressions shift from a focused gaze to a more open, speaking expression as he continues to talk into the microphone.
